text:
Created attachment 188984
security hardening_screen_shot

FreeBSD installation Document still 9.x need to update 11.1(English version)
Chapter 2-2.8. Post-Installation,need to add
"System hardening"
"Choose system security hardening options:"

"[] Hide processes running as other users"
"[] Hide processes runing as other groupds
"[] Disable reading kernel messages buffer for unprivileged users"
"[] Disable process debugging facilities for unprivileged users"
"[] Randomize the PID of newly created processes"
"[] Insert stack guard page ahead of the growable segments"
"[] Clean the /tmp filesystem on system startup"
"[] Disable opening Syslogd network socket (disable remote logging)"
"[] Disable Sendmail service"
